prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your camping trips forward
items: Research and identify 5 potential camping destinations within your preferred travel distance
Check weather patterns and seasonal conditions for your top 3 camping destinations
Research campground amenities, regulations, and booking requirements for each destination
Create a comparison chart of your top camping destinations with key factors like distance, cost, and activities
Verify cell phone coverage and internet connectivity at your top camping destination choices
Scout nearby emergency services, hospitals, and ranger stations for your chosen camping area
